directive_check_adaptive_rag_topology.evidence: Desktop and tablet show full 27-node DAG across 6 phases rendered all at once. All nodes visible simultaneously with no collapsed high-level summary layer and no expand-sub-flow affordance. Mobile squeezes full graph into narrow column — unreadable.
